channel.title: Call Center Dashboard on Jayasri Pudota
channel.description: Recent content in Call Center Dashboard on Jayasri Pudota

item.title: Call Center Dashboard
item.description: Designed and developed a comprehensive Excel-based dashboard to analyze key call centre performance metrics. The dashboard features a calls trend line graph to monitor activity over time, a weekday trend bar chart to highlight peak operational days, and a dynamic chart visualizing calls and revenue by representative. Additional insights include calls segmented by customer demographics, a rating distribution histogram to evaluate customer satisfaction, and a detailed customer revenue analysis table enhanced with conditional formatting and data bars. This project showcases strong proficiency in Excel for data analysis, visualization, and interactive reporting.
